title: WindowsStartingOverlay
description: This is an extremely simple mod that changes the game's loading screen at startup to the loading interface of the Windows 10 system.
body:
This is an extremely simple mod that changes the game's loading screen at startup to the loading interface of the Windows 10 system, and it has been open-sourced on GitHub.

If you are not satisfied with the default startup icon and loading animation in this mod, you can modify the icons and loading animation frames displayed at startup by changing the `icon.png` file located in `assets/wso/icon.png` or the images in the `assets/wso/loading` directory within the mod's JAR file, through resource packs or other methods.
